description: A session containing a known fix/resolve statement plus unrelated discussion. The solution-typed knowledge entry should surface first for a fix-language query.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: The authentication middleware was throwing a 401 on valid tokens.

seed_turns.speaker: assistant
seed_turns.content: That sounds like a token expiry configuration issue.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: We fixed the auth bug by updating the JWT_SECRET environment variable to match the new signing key.

seed_turns.speaker: assistant
seed_turns.content: Good catch. Make sure to rotate secrets regularly.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: Also discussed adding OAuth2 as an alternative login method in the future.

seed_entries.summary: Fixed 401 authentication error by updating JWT_SECRET environment variable
seed_entries.details: The middleware was comparing tokens against the old signing key. Resolved by updating JWT_SECRET to match the new key in all environments.

query: how did we resolve the authentication 401 error
